description_long: This is a human figure dressed in a full-body spacesuit, complete with a large, rigid backpack unit and a domed helmet with a transparent visor. The suit is detailed with ribbed joints at the elbows, knees, and waist, and features red accent lines along the arms and legs. The chest area displays a control panel and mission patches, while the gloves and boots are reinforced for protection. The backpack appears to be a life-support system, with visible hoses and structural elements. The overall appearance is that of an astronaut prepared for extra-vehicular activity, with a focus on safety, insulation, and mobility.
description: A human figure in a detailed astronaut spacesuit with a large backpack unit, helmet, and reinforced gloves and boots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helmet visor, chest control panel, mission patches, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, the thickness of the backpack, and the ribbed joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full size and structure of the backpack unit and the back of the suit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the helmet, backpack, and suit details.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body astronaut spacesuit with helmet, gloves, boots, and a rigid life-support backpack
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
